title: Cybersecurity Expert
description: Cybersecurity Experts protect computer systems, networks, and data from cyber threats. They analyze security risks, implement security measures, and respond to security incidents to ensure data confidentiality, integrity, and availability.
content: Cybersecurity experts are in high demand in India due to the increasing reliance on digital infrastructure and the growing threat of cyberattacks. They work in various sectors, including IT, finance, government, and e-commerce. This career requires strong analytical skills, technical expertise, and a commitment to staying updated with the latest security threats and technologies.

financialFeasibility.note: While specialized training and certifications can be costly, numerous affordable online courses and government-sponsored skill development programs are available, making this career accessible to students from diverse financial backgrounds.

sectorScore.remarks: Strong demand in both government (CERT-In, NIC) and private sectors (IT companies, banks, e-commerce). Private sector offers higher salaries and faster growth.
